# Verus Wiki

> Complete documentation for the Verus blockchain protocol: 201 CLI commands,
> VerusID self-sovereign identity, protocol-level DeFi, PBaaS multi-chain,
> zero-knowledge privacy, and AI agent integration guides.
> Source: https://wiki.autobb.app
> Full content: https://wiki.autobb.app/llms-full.txt
> Agent index: https://wiki.autobb.app/agent-index.json
> Search API: https://wiki.autobb.app/api/search?q={query}

## Introduction

- [The Hidden Power of Verus](https://wiki.autobb.app/introduction/the-hidden-power-of-verus/)
